ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Booking_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Booking_Status__c, "Confirmed"), OR( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Booking_Status__c)) = "Cancelled", TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Booking_Status__c)) = "Refunded" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cancelled or Refunded bookings cannot be changed back to Confirmed.
